summary: Site Visit Management Testing - Iteration 97. All backend APIs and frontend dialogs working correctly. 16 sales stages verified including 3 new site visit stages. Sr. Site Engineers and Ongoing Projects endpoints return correct data. Site visit assignment and completion APIs functional.
seed_data_creation: Created test site visits via API: TEST_site_visit_iteration97, TEST_ongoing_project_visit_iteration97
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site Visit Management fully functional. 16 sales stages with Site Visit (Client Land) at order 5, Site Visit (Our Projects) at order 6, Site Visit Done at order 7. 3 Sr. Site Engineers available. 4 ongoing projects with site engineer details. Vinoth lead is in Site Visit (Our Projects) stage assigned to Lakshmi Villa project.

feature_1_16_sales_stages.description: GET /api/crm/stages?stage_type=sales returns 16 stages including site visit stages
feature_1_16_sales_stages.evidence: 16 stages found: New Appointment, Follow-up, Discussion, Site Visit, Site Visit (Client Land), Site Visit (Our Projects), Site Visit Done, Rough Estimate Requested, RE-From Planning, RE-To Client, Negotiation, Deal Closed, Payment Collect, Accountant Approval, Project Onboarded, Lost

feature_2_sr_site_engineers.description: GET /api/crm/sr-site-engineers returns list of Sr. Site Engineers
feature_2_sr_site_engineers.evidence: 3+ Sr. Site Engineers returned with user_id, name, phone, email, region

feature_3_ongoing_projects.description: GET /api/crm/ongoing-projects returns 4 active projects with site engineer details
feature_3_ongoing_projects.evidence: 4 projects: Lakshmi Villa (Ramesh Kumar), Krishna Residency (TEST_SE_ftb6ae), Ganesh Towers, Murugan Heights

feature_4_assign_client_land_visit.evidence: Lead moved to stg_sv_client_land, site_visit_data populated with sr_engineer_id, sr_engineer_name

feature_5_assign_ongoing_project_visit.evidence: Lead moved to stg_sv_ongoing_project, site_visit_data populated with project_id, project_name, site_engineer details

feature_6_complete_site_visit.evidence: Lead moved to stg_sv_done, site_visit_data.visit_status set to completed

feature_7_validation_errors.description: API returns 400 for missing required fields
feature_7_validation_errors.evidence: client_land without sr_engineer_id returns 400, ongoing_project without project_id returns 400

feature_8_frontend_kanban_stages.description: Kanban shows all 16 stages including site visit stages
feature_8_frontend_kanban_stages.evidence: Site Visit (Client Land), Site Visit (Our Projects), Site Visit Done columns visible in Kanban

feature_9_client_land_dialog.description: Site Visit (Client Land) dialog with Sr. Engineer dropdown
feature_9_client_land_dialog.evidence: Dialog shows Sr. Site Engineer dropdown (data-testid='select-sr-engineer'), Visit Date (data-testid='sv-visit-date'), Notes input, Assign Engineer button (data-testid='confirm-client-land-visit')

feature_10_ongoing_project_dialog.description: Site Visit (Our Projects) dialog with project search and cards
feature_10_ongoing_project_dialog.evidence: Dialog shows Search Projects input (data-testid='project-search'), 4 project cards with engineer details, Visit Date, Assign Visit button (data-testid='confirm-ongoing-project-visit')

feature_11_site_visit_info_on_cards.description: Lead cards in site visit stages show engineer name, project, date
feature_11_site_visit_info_on_cards.evidence: Vinoth card in Site Visit (Our Projects) shows: Engineer: Ramesh Kumar, Project: Lakshmi Villa, 2026-03-21
